sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (primary_key Int32, secondary_key Int32, value String, partition_key Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() PARTITION BY partition_key ORDER BY (primary_key, secondary_key);
INSERT INTO test_table (primary_key, secondary_key, value, partition_key) VALUES (1, 2, 'test1', 1), (1, 2, 'test1', 1), (2, 3, 'test2', 1), (2, 3, 'test2', 2);
SELECT primary_key, secondary_key, count(*) FROM test_table GROUP BY primary_key, secondary_key;
UPDATE test_table SET value = 'updated_value' WHERE primary_key = 1 AND secondary_key = 2;
